# showsDisclosureIndicator

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the list item cell shows a disclosure indicator on its trailing edge.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var showsDisclosureIndicator: Bool { get }
```

## Deprecated Properties

- **showsExplicitLabel**: A Boolean value that determines whether the list item displays its explicit content indicator.
- **setRootTemplate(_:animated:)**: Sets the root template, starting a new stack for the template navigation hierarchy.
- **pushTemplate(_:animated:)**: Pushes a template onto the navigation stack and updates the CarPlay display.
- **popTemplate(animated:)**: Pops the top template from the navigation stack and updates the CarPlay display.
- **popToRootTemplate(animated:)**: Pops all templates on the stack—except the root template—and updates the CarPlay display.
- **pop(to:animated:)**: Pops templates until the specified template is at the top of the navigation stack.
- **presentTemplate(_:animated:)**: Presents a template modally.
- **dismissTemplate(animated:)**: Dismisses the template that the interface controller is displaying modally.
